# Place NDVI CSV stacks here for the GitHub R pipeline (gitignored).
#
# Download from the SACBAD DATA Zenodo deposit (paper DOI), folder:
#
#   Input Data/NDVI/NDVI_anual_est_csv/
#   Input Data/NDVI/NDVI_prim_est_csv/   (if published)
#   Input Data/NDVI/NDVI_ver_est_csv/    (if published)
#   Input Data/NDVI/base.tif             (optional)
#
# Copy those folders/files into this directory (Input/external/ndvi/).
# Then run: Rscript run_all.R
#
# See docs/ZENODO_NDVI.md
